productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Drip Swoosh Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack  round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a graphic print on the front and grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to play hard in this black Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike. The bold red swoosh graphic on the front with the melting paint amplifies the brand image and gives this tee a big dose of energy. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.
